notes: Light ERA / soft-kill appliqué armor. Lower protection than full Kontakt-5 or Relikt. Used on vehicle sides, turret roofs, and light armored vehicles. Typical: ~1.2-1.5x vs HEAT, minimal vs APFSDS. Common on light IFVs, up-armored MRAPs, and legacy MBT side skirts. BHN placeholder — ERA does not have Brinell hardness.
